content:
IVX EXPO GO FINAL DEVICE CERTIFICATION — COMPLETE ALL INCOMPLETE ITEMS NOW

Current result is NOT complete.

Server-side delivery is verified:
- Tunnel live
- Manifest 200
- Bundle 200
- Metro running
- Bundle size 37.6 MB

But owner-device acceptance is still incomplete.

Do not repeat the 30-root report.
Do not return server-only proof.
Do not mark Expo Go verified until the real IVX app opens and all critical screens work on the owner Android phone.

==================================================
1. VERIFY EXPO GO VERSION
==================================================

Confirm the owner phone has the latest Expo Go version compatible with the current Expo SDK.

Return:

EXPO_GO_VERSION=
EXPO_SDK=
COMPATIBLE=true/false
UPDATE_REQUIRED=true/false

If update is required, state only:

OWNER ACTION:
Update Expo Go from Google Play.

==================================================
2. VERIFY PHONE NETWORK CONDITIONS
==================================================

Confirm on the owner Android phone:

- internet works;
- VPN off;
- Private DNS off temporarily;
- ad blocker/firewall off temporarily;
- old IVX project entry removed;
- Expo Go fully closed and reopened;
- latest tunnel link used.

Return:

PHONE_INTERNET=
VPN=
PRIVATE_DNS=
AD_BLOCKER=
OLD_PROJECT_REMOVED=
NEW_TUNNEL_OPENED=

==================================================
3. TEST THE CURRENT TUNNEL ON DEVICE
==================================================

Current tunnel:

exp://9gmyh1o-anonymous-8081.exp.direct

Verify from the owner phone:

MANIFEST_DOWNLOAD=
BUNDLE_DOWNLOAD=
DOWNLOAD_TIME=
IVX_SPLASH=
IVX_HOME=
ERROR_SCREEN=
EXPO_ERROR_LOG=

Do not mark PASS if only the server confirms bundle download.

==================================================
4. REDUCE THE 37.6 MB BUNDLE
==================================================

Current bundle size:

37,643,697 bytes

This is too large for reliable Expo Go testing.

Audit the bundle and identify:

- admin modules loaded at startup;
- owner-only modules loaded at startup;
- large JSON files;
- embedded images;
- embedded videos;
- duplicate dependencies;
- debug code;
- recovery modules;
- AI modules;
- developer workspace;
- unused route imports;
- eager imports;
- generated files.

Return top 20 largest modules/assets.

Apply:

- route-level lazy loading;
- dynamic imports;
- defer owner/admin modules;
- defer media modules;
- remove accidental binary imports;
- remove duplicate packages;
- split public and owner bundles;
- keep all functionality.

Required:

BUNDLE_SIZE_BEFORE=
BUNDLE_SIZE_AFTER=
REDUCTION_PERCENT=

Target:
Under 15 MB if technically possible.

==================================================
5. STARTUP PERFORMANCE
==================================================

Measure on owner Android phone:

MANIFEST_DOWNLOAD_MS=
BUNDLE_DOWNLOAD_MS=
JS_STARTUP_MS=
TIME_TO_SPLASH_MS=
TIME_TO_HOME_MS=

No timeout.
No frozen screen.
No blue Expo error.

==================================================
6. VERIFY REAL IVX HOME
==================================================

Confirm the loaded app is the real IVX platform.

Verify visible markers:

- IVX HOLDINGS
- Home
- Invest
- Market
- Portfolio
- Chat
- Profile
- live deals
- property cards
- owner login entry

Return:

REAL_IVX_BUNDLE=true/false
WRONG_PROJECT=false
STALE_BUNDLE=false

==================================================
7. MANUAL OWNER LOGIN
==================================================

Verify:

- Owner Login opens
- Email field visible
- Password field visible
- No automatic owner login
- Remember Me off by default
- Valid owner login works
- Invalid login rejected
- Owner session created
- Owner JWT present

Return:

OWNER_LOGIN_SCREEN=
AUTO_LOGIN=false
VALID_LOGIN=
INVALID_LOGIN=
OWNER_SESSION=
OWNER_JWT=

==================================================
8. OWNER SCREEN QA
==================================================

After manual owner login, open:

- Admin HQ
- Access Control
- Members
- Investors
- Buyers
- JV Deals
- CRM
- Properties
- Variables
- Developer Workspace
- Data Recovery
- Chat
- IVX Owner AI

Return for every screen:

SCREEN
OPENED
RENDERED
API_STATUS
ERROR
PASS/FAIL

==================================================
9. OWNER AI QA
==================================================

Send one real message.

Verify:

- request sent
- HTTP 200
- real model response
- no placeholder
- no fake fallback
- saved message ID
- saved AI response ID
- conversation persists after reload

Return:

MODEL=
HTTP_STATUS=
USER_MESSAGE_ID=
AI_MESSAGE_ID=
PERSISTENCE=
DUPLICATES=

==================================================
10. RELOAD AND RESTART
==================================================

Verify:

1. Reload project in Expo Go.
2. Close Expo Go.
3. Reopen Expo Go.
4. Reopen IVX project.
5. Confirm Home loads.
6. Confirm no blue screen.
7. Confirm no RedBox.
8. Confirm no fatal error.
9. Confirm no automatic owner login.
10. Confirm manual login still works.

Return:

RELOAD=
RESTART=
HOME_AFTER_RESTART=
BLUE_SCREEN=false
REDBOX=false
FATAL_ERROR=false

==================================================
11. CAPTURE EXACT DEVICE EVIDENCE
==================================================

Provide:

- screenshot of IVX Home
- screenshot of Owner Login
- screenshot of Admin HQ
- screenshot of Access Control
- screenshot of Members
- screenshot of IVX Owner AI response
- Expo Go error log if any
- Metro device connection log
- device model
- Android version
- Expo Go version

Do not use server logs as a substitute for device screenshots.

==================================================
12. COMMIT FINAL EXPO FIXES
==================================================

Commit confirmed code/config changes only.

Return:

FILES_CHANGED=
COMMIT_SHA=
BRANCH=
REMOTE=
METRO_PORT=
TUNNEL_URL=
BUNDLE_SIZE_AFTER=

Do not commit temporary tunnel URLs or phone-specific IP addresses.

==================================================
FINAL VERDICT
==================================================

Return exactly one:

IVX EXPO GO VERIFIED WORKING ON OWNER ANDROID DEVICE

or

IVX EXPO GO NOT VERIFIED

Do not return VERIFIED unless:

- Expo Go version is compatible;
- phone network conditions are verified;
- manifest downloads on phone;
- bundle downloads on phone;
- real IVX Home renders;
- manual Owner Login works;
- Admin HQ opens;
- Access Control opens;
- Members opens;
- IVX Owner AI responds;
- reload works;
- restart works;
- no blue screen;
- no RedBox;
- no fatal error;
- device screenshots are provided;
- bundle optimization is completed or justified.

If incomplete, return only:

FAILED_STAGE:
DEVICE:
EXPO_GO_VERSION:
TUNNEL:
MANIFEST:
BUNDLE:
BUNDLE_SIZE:
FIRST_ERROR:
ROOT_CAUSE:
FIX_APPLIED:
RETEST_RESULT:
OWNER_ACTION_REQUIRED:
NEXT_EXACT_ACTION:
